title: Servertestpack1248
description: just a custom modpack, based around haste with create and cobblemon additions
body:
Serverpack1248, a performance-focused Minecraft modpack that brings together the best of optimization, creativity, and Pokémon-inspired gameplay!




## **_What This Pack Offers:_**
Unparalleled Performance: Built on a foundation of (not) carefully selected and configured optimization mods, this pack aims to deliver smooth gameplay both on pojavlauncher and pc sided. 
Create Mod Integration: Unleash your engineering creativity with the Create mod, allowing for complex contraptions and automated systems.
Cobblemon Experience: Dive into a world of catchable creatures with Cobblemon, adding a whole new dimension to your Minecraft adventures.

and some more tweaks to this experience!
